caption: A man with a goatee, wearing a black t-shirt that says "CHECK IT" and a black baseball cap with a gold emblem, is speaking during a podcast recording. He wears large silver headphones and gold chains around his neck. He sits in front of a microphone and a white backdrop featuring the repeated text "EMPOWER HUSTLE" and yellow stars. On-screen graphics include a logo on the left that says "BOSS TALK PODCAST" and a banner on the right that reads "BOSS TALK 101". In the background, a large sign reads "BOSS TALK 101". As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his gaze and body position; he begins by looking slightly to the side and gesturing with his right hand, then turns his head further to the right, looks back toward the center, and finally looks slightly upward and to the right while speaking.
